name: Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure
author: Poki
description: Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure is a funny prank game where you join Nick, Tani, and their mischievous friends to pull off the ultimate tricks on the scary teacher! Sneak around, set clever traps, and work together in hilarious multiplayer missions. With a mix of casual and arcade fun, every prank is a perfect blend of humor and suspense. Ready to outsmart the Scary Teacher and laugh your way to victory How to play Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure? Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure is created by ZnK Games. Play their other games on Poki: Hide and Seek , Prankster 3D , Pull the String , Scary Little Prankster , School's Out , Scary Teacher 3D , and School Escape! ! Scary Teacher PlayTime Adventure can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
